_note: Seed data for the MassanApp prototype. Venue facts come from the Stockholmsmassan research note. Event dates, types, and categories reflect the official Stockholmsmassan calendar on 2026-04-17. Per-event news, articles, program items, exhibitors, and speakers are clearly simulated content scoped to this prototype; production use would pull from the event's own sources.

venue.name: Stockholmsmassan

transport.summary: Alvsjo station is adjacent to Stockholmsmassan. Commuter trains from Stockholm City take about 9 minutes. Direct travel from Arlanda Airport to Alvsjo is also available.

modes.detail: SL pendeltag from Stockholm City stops directly at Alvsjo station in about 9 minutes.
Direct services from Arlanda to Alvsjo are available without changing in central Stockholm.
Several SL bus lines stop at Alvsjo stationsplan, which is a short walk from the main entrance.
Marked cycle paths connect Alvsjo to central Stockholm. Covered bike parking is available near the main entrance.

parking.summary: About 2,000 parking spaces on site, additional nearby overflow parking, and EV charging.
parking.notes: Parking is paid and fills quickly during large trade fairs and congresses. Pre-booking is recommended for events with heavy visitor volumes.

restaurants.name: Restaurant Rattvik
restaurants.description: Full-service on-site restaurant serving lunch during events.

restaurants.name: Cafe Kista
restaurants.description: Coffee, pastries, and quick lunch options near the main foyer.

restaurants.name: Bistro Nordic
restaurants.description: Seasonal a-la-carte menu oriented to business lunches and congress delegates.

restaurants.name: Hall Cafeteria East
restaurants.description: Buffet-style cafeteria close to the East Halls for peak-lunch throughput.

restaurants.name: Hall Cafeteria West
restaurants.description: Buffet-style cafeteria close to the West Halls.

restaurants.name: Espresso Bar Foyer
restaurants.description: Quick espresso and grab-and-go snacks inside the main foyer.

security.summary: Stockholmsmassan is the first exhibition venue in Sweden certified to the SHORE safety standard. Bag checks, access control, and event-specific entry procedures are in place.
general_rules: Bags are subject to visual inspection at entry.
Oversize luggage should be left at the cloakroom or returned to a hotel.
Follow staff and signage regarding special entrances for specific events.
Report anything suspicious to on-site security; emergency exits are marked throughout the venue.

venue.sustainability: Stockholmsmassan is ISO 20121 certified and runs an active sustainability program spanning energy, waste, catering, and supplier choices.

maps.name: Venue overview
maps.description: High-level map showing entrances, halls, foyers, and conference rooms. Rendered inline in the prototype as a placeholder graphic.

events.name: Nordbygg 2026
events.subtitle: Nordic construction trade fair
events.summary: Nordbygg is the leading Nordic meeting place for the construction and real-estate industry, with exhibitors, seminars, and industry news across four days at Stockholmsmassan.

overrides.entrance: Enter through the main foyer at Stockholmsmassan. Nordbygg signage guides visitors to registration in the A-Hall foyer.
overrides.bag_rules: Work bags and smaller backpacks are allowed on the fair floor; oversize luggage should be checked at the cloakroom.
overrides.access_notes: A visitor ticket grants access to all exhibition halls and seminar rooms. Some seminars have limited seating on a first-come basis.

events.name: ESTRO 2026
events.subtitle: European Society for Radiotherapy and Oncology Annual Congress
events.summary: ESTRO 2026 is the European Society for Radiotherapy and Oncology annual congress, covering clinical practice, physics, radiobiology, and technology across a multi-track program.

overrides.entrance: Registration and badge pickup for ESTRO 2026 are located in the North Foyer. Delegates should bring photo ID on the first day.
overrides.bag_rules: Standard venue bag rules apply; congress materials are distributed at the registration desk.
overrides.access_notes: Access is restricted to registered delegates, exhibitors, and accredited media. Sessions marked as closed require additional access codes.

events.name: EHA2026 Congress
events.subtitle: European Hematology Association Annual Congress
events.summary: The European Hematology Association annual congress brings clinicians and researchers together for plenaries, symposia, abstract presentations, and an industry exhibition.

overrides.entrance: EHA2026 delegates enter through the East Foyer. Congress badges are required for all sessions.
overrides.bag_rules: Standard venue bag rules apply. Poster tubes and rollable cases are accommodated at the cloakroom.
overrides.access_notes: On-demand session recordings are available to registered delegates on the EHA congress platform after the congress.

news.title: Nordbygg 2026 exhibitor registrations cross 700
news.body: Simulated. Nordbygg reports that more than 700 exhibitors have confirmed attendance, spanning sustainable materials, prefabrication, building services, and digital tools for the construction industry.

news.title: Sustainability stage program finalized
news.body: Simulated. The Sustainability Stage program for Nordbygg 2026 covers circular construction, low-carbon concrete, and energy retrofits. All sessions are open to fair visitors without extra registration.

news.title: Site-safety workshops added to day three
news.body: Simulated. Day three of the fair adds hands-on workshops on site-safety equipment, PPE, and fall-protection. Capacity is limited and managed at the workshop entrance.

news.title: Ticket pickup and visitor tips for opening day
news.body: Simulated. Visitors are encouraged to pre-register and use mobile tickets to skip the queues at opening. Coffee will be available in the main foyer from 8:00.

news.title: Late-breaking abstract window closes
news.body: Simulated. The late-breaking abstract submission window for ESTRO 2026 has closed. Accepted late-breakers will be added to the searchable program next week.

news.title: Industry symposia and hands-on demos announced
news.body: Simulated. Industry symposia and hands-on demos for ESTRO 2026 have been published in the congress program. Delegates can filter their personal agenda to include or exclude industry content.

news.title: EHA2026 congress platform opens to registered delegates
news.body: Simulated. The EHA2026 congress platform is now available to registered delegates, with networking, profile setup, and the full searchable program.

articles.title: Why Nordbygg 2026 is the Nordic construction meeting point
articles.body: Simulated. Nordbygg collects the Nordic construction and real-estate industry under one roof at Stockholmsmassan: manufacturers, consultants, architects, developers, and public-sector procurement teams. The fair combines an exhibitor floor, a seminar program, and dedicated stages for sustainability and digital tools. Visitors use the fair to benchmark products, meet suppliers in person, and get an overview of emerging regulation.

articles.title: What to see on a one-day visit
articles.body: Simulated. If you only have one day at Nordbygg 2026, focus on the Sustainability Stage in the morning, spend midday on the exhibitor floor around the prefabrication and building-services areas, and close the day with a site-safety workshop or a digital-tools demo. The event-first app view lets you save a short list of exhibitors to visit on the floor.

articles.title: ESTRO 2026 program highlights
articles.body: Simulated. The ESTRO 2026 program covers clinical radiation oncology, medical physics, radiobiology, brachytherapy, and technology and innovation tracks. Plenary sessions open and close each day, with parallel tracks and poster sessions filling the rest of the schedule. Delegates are encouraged to build a personal agenda before the congress opens.
